title: EASTROCK Soprano Recorder for Beginners Kids, C Key Recorder German Style, Soprano Recorder ABS 3 Pieces with Cleaning Rod Fingering Chart Packing Bag Thumb Rest (Dark Blue)
features: ♪ Special Design-Eastrock Soprano Recorder adopts a 3-piece structure, and the position of the C hole can be adjusted according to the size of the hand. The finely polished mouthpiece can fit your mouth very well, and the German fingering is very suitable for beginners. The sound of this recorder is bright and easy to play. It can help beginners improve their listening and motor skills in music, allowing beginners to learn musical instruments actively and happily

♪ Easy to Clean-The surface of this recorder is very smooth and it is very easy to clean. You only need to use a cleaning rod to clean the inside of the soprano recorder. Pay attention to daily cleaning and maintenance. This recorder instrument comes with a suitable storage bag, so you can take it with you

♪ Good Material-This Soprano recorder is made of high-quality ABS material, wear-resistant, waterproof, high hardness, light weight, and excellent high-frequency vibration ability, so the sound is bright, with strong penetrating power, and the Recorder German style is suitable for performances Classroom, stage and band
♪ Package Included-ABS 3 pieces of Soprano Recorder German fingering, Cleaning Rod, Fingering Chart, Packing Bag, Thumb Rest, Lanyard

♪ No-hassle Warranty - If the Recorder instrument ever fails due to manufacturing defects,We promise, for as long as you own the instrument and have proof of purchase, we'll provide you with parts for free ,feel free to reach us by message to contact our support team
description: EastRock strictly control the process of production ,just for high-quality and quality standards.We will try our best to develop more better products for Children's Music Enlightenment Education Specifications 1. Color: White 2. Fingering:German Style 3. Material: Non-toxic ABS 4. Key:Key Of C 5. Level:Beginning & Intermediate Level Instrument 6. Item Weight:0.14kg
